programme.title: Undone: Female Big-Wave Surfing
programme.desc: Undone is a remarkable story of personal endeavor following female professional surfer, Laura Enever, who leaves a top spot on the WSL Championship Tour to explore the unpredictable world of big-wave surfing. In a life altering change, Laura works to break into the male dominated sport by pursuing some of the most dangerous and remote waves on the planet.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep108: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament More Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 2)

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep707: Paddling Poland

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Ice Fishing vs Propane
programme.desc: Ice Fishing vs. Propane In this episode, Mike takes a long-time AmeriGas employee out ice fishing and then learns the ins and outs of the world of residential propane! Stay tuned for the end and see how many fish were caught!

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep107: Hawaii’s North Shore…A Battle For The World Title
programme.desc: For two Australian surfers from the Gold Coast, best friends Mick Fanning and Joel Parkinson, it's been a long year of competition before arriving in the tropical waters of Hawaii. They're poised to battle it out for first place on the Championship Tour and the honor of being the World Champion. The North Shore of the island of Oahu is home to some of the best waves on the planet, and none more notorious than the Banzai pipeline.

programme.title: Blue World Ep811: Jojo the Friendly Dolphin + Gator Hole Cave in the Turks Caicos Islands
programme.desc: Jonathan, Blue World's host, and his enitre family travel to the Turks Caicos Islands in search of a famous local celebrity—Jojo the friendly dolphin. Then Blue World explores a hidden cave—keeping an eye out for the alligators, for which it’s named!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep209: Boating New York City’s Waters with Scientist Neil deGrasse Tyson as Tour Guide
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, cruises the waters of New York City with Neil deGrasse Tyson as his personal tour guide.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: K2 Snowboarding Presents: Jumbo Easy
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Dopamine
programme.desc: Dopamine is a naturally occurring chemical produced by the human brain, which controls movement and reward. In the world of progressive snowboarding, the joy of physical movement and the reward of being outside are the two greatest factors motivating riders to evolve and innovate. The Absinthe Films documentary Dopamine captures professional snowboarders pushing boundaries and chasing storms across the Chilkats, Valhallas, Monashees, Dolomites, and Pyrenees mountains.

programme.title: La Zone
programme.desc:
In the early 2000's, snowboard filmer David 'Vlad' Vladyka and a handful of riders discovered an off-the-radar area on the French-Swiss border that held massive potential for shooting freestyle snowboarding. The mountain pass featured rolling terrain punctuated by steep roll overs that are perfect for building jumps. The area was Le Col de Cou, and though it had a name, the riders called it 'La Zone', a purposefully vague nickname that would help them keep the area a secret.
Over the next decade, La Zone would become one of the most productive and standard setting locations for filming freestyle snowboarding in all of Europe. Shots from La Zone were featured in several Absinthe films, and many others.
Now 20 years later, Jones team rider Mat Schaer and Vlad still return to La Zone to film from time to time, but the pristine slopes they enjoyed in the past are much harder to find as Le Col de Cou has become a popular ski touring destination.
Featuring new and historic footage from La Zone, this new short film directed by Julien Rosens, and produced by Absinthe Films, highlights the history, beauty and inevitable evolution of this legendary shred spot.
Credits LA ZONE, a movie directed by Julien Roserens Produced by Absinthe Films Supported by Jonessnowboards, Region Dents du Midi, Doodah store Edited by Jules Guarneri Soundmix by Stephane Chapelle Graphics by René Zumstein Photo by Michael Cordey Music : Tugrul by Ochre, Rhea by Yehezkel Raz, Where It Beginns It Ends by Be Still The Earth, Strange Life de YGGL, Let Us Get Out by Redder

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Kuwaiti Aspirations Therapeutic Riding
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re in Kuwait for a look at the country’s jumping community past and present, meeting the British woodsman using logging horses to minimise his impact on the environment, making a positive difference to the lives of disabled children in New Zealand with the help of therapy horses, and aiming for Tokyo with Mexican rider Francisco Pasquel.

The British team of Tom McEwen, Mollie Summerland and Georgie Spence are eager to take the first place at home, but Australian Kevin McNab, Sam Griffiths and Sophie Adams are proving to be a worthy rival. programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: The Faith Community
programme.desc: A group of religious students drive into the remote wilderness to spend time with a religious sect and strengthen their bond with God. The three unsuspecting students film everything to document their experience but soon find themselves in the dark.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E38 - HM The Queen A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: The most notable woman in modern times has to be our Late Queen, Elizabeth II. She ruled for 70 years, the longest reign in British history. Once a princess who wasn't supposed to be queen, Elizabeth II led the country to thrive after World War II and became a steady presence in our changing world. In a thousand years of British monarchy, Elizabeth II is likely one of the most outstanding monarchs ever.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E04 - Battle Plans
programme.desc: Surviving in the wild often means being able to fight and win. This fighting strategy is called agonism and is used to set ranks, get resources, claim territory, and attract partners. There's no certainty in the wild, but animals that get good at agonism have a better shot at living to see another day.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One
programme.desc: Montana wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out-of-season deer; anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Floating
programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Suddenly

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: You Don't Have To
programme.desc: Feeling overwhelmed by the pressure of obstacles and obligations? Shift your attention from how you’ll get through it to Who will get you through it. You’re not alone, God is with you.

programme.title: God Will Work It In!
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn’t getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He’s already given you what you need — and He’ll help you work it in to what you’re facing.

programme.title: Win Before You Begin
programme.desc: Winning starts long before the battle does. When your thoughts are grounded in God’s truth, fear loses its hold and peace takes its place. You walk in victory when you let God’s Word shape how you see your situation.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck — that’s how Moses felt, too. But that wasn’t the end of his story, and it’s not yours, either. It’s just the middle. There’s hope past this chapter, and it’s found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto and Ezequiel confront each other; the video that projects Celso's death will sink Fausto unless he signs a confession where he clarifies that Rosa Blanco was unjustly condemned. Fausto manipulates saying that Ezequiel also confesses that he killed his brother Augusto, Camila's father. She arrives in time to stop Ezequiel from shooting Fausto.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto, narrates in detail what happened years ago. He lies blatantly, Torrealba thinks he wants to blame his wife for having been unfaithful to him. Camila reproaches Mother Isabel harshly. Rosa cannot appear because they want to kill her. Axel, disappointed because Amelia hid the paternity of his son from him.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje

Lorena receives a package from her husband.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado

Guillermo warns Lorena of the danger her son faces for having fled the Corona household without killing Marco Aurelio.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: Abolición De La Propiedad
programme.desc: En un sótano oscuro, Norma escucha su voz y la de Everio en una vieja grabadora Ampex. Cada que él vuelve a bajar, la detiene. Han estado platicándose sus vidas, varias veces las conversaciones grabadas terminan coincidiendo con las charlas que ellos sostienen. Lo que le preocupa a Norma es que hasta ese día no conocía a Everio y lo último que escuchó fue que él la ahorcaba.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: Martí Noticias
programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
